name.ja: ディパーチャー・ゾーン

requirement.en: Activate this card by sending the top 2 cards of your Deck to the Graveyard, except during the first turn of the player going first.

effect.en: While this card is face-up in the Field Zone, this card cannot be destroyed by card effects, and during the Draw Phase of a player that has a card in their Field Zone, if they would draw until they have 5 cards in their hand for their normal draw, instead they draw until they have 6 cards.
